title: How can I set a hidden date column to "today" when using subitems?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have a hidden Date column in my subitems and I want to update that Date, but it simply does not work with the automation. Does anybody know a way how I can get the date in the Hidden Date column? I have copied …

posts.author: PDaech (Philipp Dächert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have a hidden Date column in my subitems and I want to update that Date, but it simply does not work with the automation. Does anybody know a way how I can get the date in the Hidden Date column? I have copied the automation and it works with an unhidden column.

image1298×112 7.94 KB

Thank you in advance for your assistance!
